name: c2c-plugin-porter
description: Codex plugin for porting Claude plugins into Codex plugins.

interface.shortDescription: Turn Claude plugins into Codex plugins.
interface.longDescription: Assesses Claude plugin portability, resolves Claude-specific runtime references, and generates Codex plugin scaffolds with caveats.
defaultPrompt: Assess this Claude plugin for Codex portability.
Convert this Claude plugin into a Codex plugin.
Explain which Claude references need rewriting.
